g.title: Fare zone 1. If possible, avoid this zone in your journey and tap your checked-in contactless card at any pink route validator for potential fare discount.
Special fares apply. Oyster card not valid because of technical limitations. Use other contactless payments instead.
Special fares apply. Oyster card not valid because of technical limitations. Use other contactless payments instead.
Fare zone 1. If possible, avoid this zone in your journey and tap your checked-in contactless card at any pink route validator for potential fare discount.
Station between fare zones 1/2. Cheaper fare applies on traveling to/from these stations.
Station between fare zones 2/3. Cheaper fare applies on traveling to/from these stations.
Station between fare zones 3/4. Cheaper fare applies on traveling to/from these stations.
Station between fare zones 5/6. Cheaper fare applies on traveling to/from these stations.
Station between fare zones 6/7. Cheaper fare applies on traveling to/from these stations.
Interchange for Elizabeth line Heathrow Section (also calls at Ealing Broadway through Hayes & Harlington) or Heathrow Express towards Heathrow Airport.
Interchange for Thameslink local services towards Luton or Gatwick airports.
Interchange for Southern Brighton Mainline towards Gatwick airport.
Interchange for National Rail express services towards Stansted Airport.
Interchange for National Rail local services towards Southend Airport.
Interchange for National Rail express services towards Gatwick Airport.
Interchange for bus towards Heathrow or Luton airports.
Interchange for National Rail services towards Stansted or Southend airports.
Stansted Express (National Rail) serving between London Liverpool Street, Tottenham Hale and Stansted Airport railway stations.
National Rail serving between Tottenham Hale and Stratford without intermediate station for passengers interchange train for Stansted Airport.

National Rail service between London Liverpool Street and Southend Airport/Southend Victoria. Intermediate stations within the network of Transport for London are Stratford, Shenfield and less frequently Romford. On Sundays, trains for Southend also call at Brentwood, Harold Wood and Gidea Park.
Gatwick Express (National Rail) serving between London Victoria, Gatwick Airport and Brighton railway stations without any other intermediate stations.
Southern Brighton Mainline (National Rail) serving between London Victoria, Clapham Junction, East Croydon, Gatwick Airport and Brighton.
Thameslink (National Rail). Stations not interchangeable with rail services of Transport for London are not shown in this map.
Elizabeth line (rush hour special services between Liverpool Street National Rail station and Gidea Park station)
Waterloo & City line. Out of service on Sundays or public holidays.
Kensington (Olympia) branch of District line. Operates only on weekends and some public holidays. Check the latest official timetable for details.
Battersea Park branch of Overground Windrush line. Operates infrequently as parliamentary service. Check the latest official timetable for details.
Thameslink is a National Rail franchise not under control of Transport for London.
Tramlink. Fare is independent to the general zonal system of railways in London.
Fenchurch Street Nationa Rail station. Free out-of-station interchange to surrounding Underground and DLR stations within 20 minutes, 40 minutes for the opposite direction.
Free out-of-station interchange between all Bank-Monument gatelines within 15 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Farringdon National Rail station within 10 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange from the Underground station to Blackfriars National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
OSI between Bond Street and Oxdord Circus within 20 minutes. Convenient for Elizabeth line users.

0.1-mile walking distance between Heron Quays DLR and Canary Wharf Jubilee line stations within 15 minutes; 0.1-mile walking distance between Canary Wharf DLR and Canary Wharf Jubilee line stations within 20 minutes.
Canary Wharf Underground Jubilee line station

path.title: 0.3-mile walking distance within 20 minutes. Be aware of the occasional exit-only restriction of Camden Town station on Sundays.

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange to Cannon Street National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Free out-of-station interchange to Charing Cross National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Clapham High Street Overground-National Rail station
0.2-mile walking distance within 20 minutes. Some trains terminate at Dalston Junction instead of Highbury & Islington.
Ealing Broadway Underground-Elizabeth line-National Rail station

Free out-of-station interchange between Edgware Road stations of Bakerloo line and the other lines within 20 minutes. 0.2-mile walking distance. However, the path between 2 stations is very inconvenient.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Elephant & Castle National Rail station within 20 minutes. 0.2-mile walking distance.

Free out-of-station interchange between Euston/Euston Square Underground stations and from Euston Overground-National Rail station within 20 minutes; 40 minutes is alloted to Euston Overground-National Rail station from Euston/Euston Square Underground stations. 0.2-mile walking distance between Euston and Euston Square stations.
Free out-of-station interchange from Euston Underground to Overground-National Rail stations within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Free out-of-station interchange between Euston Square and Warren Street stations within 20 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Finsbury Park National Rail station within 10 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange within 20 minutes between the gatelines of 2 stations. 0.3-mile walking distance.
Underground Piccadilly line trains only head towards Heathrow Terminals 2 & 3 station from here without option of opposite direction.

Free out-of-station interchange between all King's Cross St. Pancras Underground station gatelines within 15 minutes; all Underground station gatelines to King's Cross National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction; all Underground station gatelines to St Pancras International station within 30 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction. Thameslink's trains use St Pancras International station.

Free out-of-station interchange from Liverpool Street Underground station to Liverpool Street National Rail (including Overground and Elizabeth line) station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Liverpool Street Overground-Elizabeth line-National Rail station. National Rail trains for Stansted and Southend airports.

use.title: Free out-of-station interchange to London Bridge National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
OSI between Bond Street and Oxdord Circus within 20 minutes. Convenient for Elizabeth line users.

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange between all Paddington Underground/Elizabeth line station gatelines within 20 minutes. Free out-of-station interchange to Paddington National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
A 170-metre pedestrian passageway connecting the platforms of Bakerloo and Elizabeth lines within the ticket barrier. Bakerloo line platforms are accessible via the Elizabeth line entrances.

use.title: A 170-metre pedestrian passageway connecting the platforms of Bakerloo and Elizabeth lines within the ticket barrier. Bakerloo line platforms are accessible via the Elizabeth line entrances.
Paddington underground platforms of Bakerloo (deep-level), Circle and District (sub-surface) lines
A 170-metre pedestrian passageway connecting the platforms of Bakerloo and Elizabeth lines within the ticket barrier. Bakerloo line platforms are accessible via the Elizabeth line entrances.
Paddington (surface) underground platforms of Circle and Hammersmith & City lines

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange between all Richmond railway station gatelines within 10 minutes because accessible routes require leaving and re-entering the paid area.

a.title: Romford Overground-Elizabeth line-National Rail station. National Rail trains for Southend Airport call at this station infrequently. Check the linked timetable of Abellio Greater Anglia for details.

use.title: Free out-of-station interchange between all Seven Sisters railway station gatelines within 20 minutes because accessible routes require leaving and re-entering the paid area.

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange between DLR and Overground stations within 15 minutes. 0.1-mile walking distance.
Free out-of-station interchange between Shepherd's Bush Underground and Overground-National Rail stations within 20 minutes. 0.1-mile walking distance.
Stratford Underground-Overground-DLR-Elizabeth line-National Rail transport hub. National Rail trains for Southend Airport.
Victoria Coach Station. 5-minute walk from Victoria Underground or National Rail stations.
Free out-of-station interchange to Victoria National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction. National Rail trains for Gatwick Airport.

Free out-of-station interchange between all Underground gatelines within 15 minutes; Waterloo Underground station to Waterloo or Waterloo East National Rail stations within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Free out of interchange between West Hampstead Underground, Overground and Thameslink stations within 20 minutes. 0.2-mile walking distance.
Free out-of-station interchange between Woolwich Arsenal and Woolwich Elizabeth line station within 20 minutes
Free out-of-station interchange to Marylebone National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction.
Free out-of-station interchange to Paddington National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction. 0.5-mile walking distance.
Free out-of-station interchange between all gatelines within 10 minutes because accessible routes require leaving and re-entering the paid area.
Wimbledon Underground-National Rail station and Tramlink terminus.

Free out-of-station interchange to/from Waterloo East National Rail station within 10 minutes; Southwark Underground station to Blackfriars National Rail station within 40 minutes, 20 minutes for the opposite direction. 0.3-mile walking distance.
London cable car Greenwich Peninsula terminal. Close by North Greenwich Underground station but fare systems are not integrated.

use.title: Free out-of-station interchange between all West Harrow gatelines within 5 minutes.

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange to/from Balham National Rail station within 20 minutes.
OSI between Battersea Park and Battersea Power Station within 20 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Sudbury Hill Harrow National Rail station within 20 minutes. 0.1-mile walking distance.

use.title: Trains of Piccadilly line stop at Turnham Green only during late nights (weekend Night Tube), early mornings (until 06:25am/07:45am Sundays) and evenings (after 10:30pm).

g.title: Free out-of-station interchange to/from Bowes Park National Rail station within 20 minutes. 0.2-mile walking distance.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Tottenham Hale National Rail station within 20 minutes. National Rail express trains for Stansted Airport from Liverpool Street also call at Tottenham Hale.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Vauxhall National Rail station within 20 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Brixton National Rail station within 20 minutes.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Limehouse National Rail station within 20 minutes.
London cable car Royal Docks terminal. Close by Royal Victoria DLR station but fare systems are not integrated. 0.4-mile walking distance to ExCeL.
Stratford International station for High Speed (Channel Tunnel Rail Link) train service
Watford Junction Overground-National Rail station. Special fares apply to/from this station because of faster options of National Rail services.
Clapham Junction Overground-National Rail station. National Rail trains for Gatwick Airport.
Free out-of-station interchange to/from Harringay National Rail station within 20 minutes. 0.3-mile walking distance.
Queens Road Peckham Overground-National Rail station
Battersea Park Overground-National Rail station. OSI between Battersea Park and Battersea Power Station within 20 minutes.
West Croydon Overground-National Rail station and Tramlink (eastbound only) stop
Hayes & Harlington Elizabeth line-National Rail station
West Ealing Elizabeth line-National Rail station
Abbey Wood Elizabeth line-National Rail station
Shenfield Elizabeth line-National Rail station. Special fares apply to/from this station because of faster options of National Rail services. National Rail trains for Southend Airport.
Pink card readers (route validators) are available in this station for verifying your chosen route has avoided zone 1 which may charge cheaper fare.

use.title: Pink card readers (route validators) are available in this station for verifying your chosen route has avoided zone 1 which may charge cheaper fare.

g.title: All Overground trains skip London Fields, Cambridge Health and Bethnal Green on Sundays before 9:15am.
